docket_entries.description: WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 76000851) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, TERRY AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MACHINES CORPORATION D/B/A IBM, A NEW YORK CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 50, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-03-2025 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-11-2025
